description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a well-defined physique, standing upright with arms slightly extended to the sides. The figure is wearing fitted, mid-thigh length shorts and is barefoot, with no visible accessories or carried items. The skin surface is smooth and anatomically detailed, showing clear muscle definition on the chest, abdomen, arms, and legs. The head is bald, with no visible facial hair or adornments. The back view reveals broad shoulders, a pronounced upper back, and a narrow waist, emphasizing athletic proportions. The overall appearance suggests a healthy, athletic adult suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or gyms.
description: A muscular, bald adult male standing upright in fitted shorts, barefoot, with detailed anatomy and no accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows a muscular chest, defined abs, and facial features with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the torso, arm, and leg muscles, with the head in profile.
description_view_2: Back view displays broad shoulders, muscular back, and the rear of the shorts, with arms and legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the body and limbs from the opposite side.
